mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, USER_NAME, USER_GRADE, LOG_YN, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS LAST_LOGIN_DTIME FROM D_SPIDERLINK.POC_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND PASSWORD = #{password}
SELECT USER_ID, USER_NAME, USER_GRADE, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS LAST_LOGIN_DTIME FROM D_SPIDERLINK.POC_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT (SELECT NVL(SUM("이용금액" - "누적결제금액"), 0) FROM D_SPIDERLINK.POC_카드사용내역 WHERE "이용자" = #{userId} AND "카드번호" = #{cardId} AND "누적결제금액" < "이용금액" AND "결제상태코드" <> '9') AS PAYABLE_AMOUNT, (SELECT NVL("한도금액", 0) FROM D_SPIDERLINK.POC_카드리스트 WHERE "사용자아이디" = #{userId} AND "카드번호" = #{cardId}) AS CREDIT_LIMIT FROM DUAL
